current.summary: Specified canonical keys vocabulary, workflow agent instructions, and created syllago-capmon-process skill for pipeline orchestration

activeWork.description: Capability monitor pipeline design — defined canonical keys schema, workflow docs, and process orchestration
activeWork.progress: Completed: (1) Formalized canonical-keys.yaml schema with 14-key skills vocabulary derived from recognize.go + seeder specs; (2) Specified update-format-doc.md and graduation-comparison.md as agent-facing workflow docs with full vocabulary constraints and confidence predicates; (3) Created syllago-capmon-process skill as hybrid orchestrator (procedural outer loop + contextual sub-agent invocation). Next: Implement canonical-keys.yaml file, commit design doc updates, implement workflow docs.

recentDecisions: Canonical keys vocabulary is source-of-truth driven: Go code (recognize.go) defines the canonical keys, canonical-keys.yaml externalizes them for LLM agents and capmon derive validation
Graduation trigger clarified: add a new canonical key when two or more providers use the same concept under different names in provider_extensions
Workflow docs (update-format-doc.md, graduation-comparison.md) are agent-facing instructions with explicit vocabulary constraints and do-not lists, not distributed CLI commands
syllago-capmon-process is a hybrid skill: outer procedural loop orchestrates, inner steps invoke LLM sub-agents for format doc updates and graduation comparisons
Process invocation: /loop 30m syllago-capmon-process runs locally, chains sub-skills update-format-doc and graduation-comparison via Agent tool
nextSteps: Create docs/canonical-keys.yaml with 14-key initial skills vocabulary from design doc spec
Create docs/workflows/update-format-doc.md from design doc specification
Create docs/workflows/graduation-comparison.md from design doc specification
Commit all design doc updates and new workflow docs
Implement capmon check, capmon derive, capmon onboard CLI sub-commands (spec ready)
Test syllago-capmon-process skill with dry-run flag before full loop integration

context.notes: The canonical keys vocabulary is now fully specified in the design doc with explicit source attribution (recognize.go line 78-98 + 13 seeder specs). The 14-key initial vocabulary (display_name, description, project_scope, global_scope, shared_scope, canonical_filename, custom_filename, disable_model_invocation, user_invocable, license, and 4 others) is ready for externalizing to canonical-keys.yaml. Workflow docs are fully specified as agent instructions with confidence predicates and vocabulary constraints. syllago-capmon-process skill created at ~/.claude/skills/syllago-capmon-process/ (hybrid architecture, disable-model-invocation: true, argument-hint: --dry-run). All uncommitted changes are in the design doc and beads metadata. Ready for file creation and implementation.
context.canvasState: Design doc fully updated with canonical-keys.yaml schema, workflow doc specifications (update-format-doc.md, graduation-comparison.md), and capmon-process skill architecture. No breaking changes needed — all specs are incremental additions to the design.
